feed.title: Scott Warren
feed.subtitle: A short blog showcasing the random tech things in my world

entry.title: Welcome to my Modern Jekyll Blog

link.title: Welcome to my Modern Jekyll Blog

entry.content:
This is my first post! Jekyll makes it easy to write in Markdown and generate a fast, secure static site.

Why Jekyll?

  • Fast: No database queries.
  • Secure: No server-side vulnerabilities.
  • Free: Hosted for free on GitHub Pages.
entry.summary: This is my first post! Jekyll makes it easy to write in Markdown and generate a fast, secure static site.
